title: 8 query/event fixes — Download data, Saved Posts open, rollback gaps
notes: FIX: Activity Log was exporting messages with empty bodies (querying nonexistent column — should be `text` not `content`)
FIX: Saved Posts can now actually be opened — the dispatched event had ZERO consumers, so tapping a saved post did nothing. Wired App.js → HomeScreen chain.
FIX: Clear all notifications now rolls back on RLS/network failure (was silently restoring on next mount)
FIX: Delete moment now actually checks for errors — was showing 'Deleted ✓' even when the DB delete failed
FIX: Delete post from your profile now rolls back on failure (matches the HomeScreen fix from Round 7)
FIX: Block user now verifies the server write succeeded before claiming the user is blocked (was lying on failure)
FIX: Sending a chat message during a network drop now removes the optimistic bubble + shows 'Message failed' (was leaving a stuck-forever ghost message)
FIX: Un-reacting to a message on a failing network now rolls back the optimistic UI (was showing reaction gone but it'd reappear next chat open)
